allow: PowerShell(cd C:\\jobs-ai; $status = "BUILDING"; while \($status -eq "BUILDING" -or $status -eq "DEPLOYING"\) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 20; $out = railway service status 2>&1 | Out-String; $status = if \($out -match "Status: \(\\w+\)"\) { $Matches[1] } else { "UNKNOWN" }; Write-Host "$\(Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm:ss'\) - $status" }; Write-Host "Done: $status")
